basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate I
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has announced the recruitment of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate I on a contract basis for the research project titled “A Novel Approach to Soft Robot Modelling and Control in Rehabilitation: A Koopman Operator Theory Perspective” in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering. The position is sponsored by ANRF. Interested candidates can apply by 22 July 2026. An offline/online interview will be held on 24 July 2026.

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | First Class in B.Tech / B.E in ECE / EEE or closely allied areas with minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA (for SC/ST/PwD category) from a recognized University. | Desirable Qualifications: | M.Tech Degree (First Class) in ECE, Embedded Systems, Mechatronics, Robotics, Control and Intelligence or related fields. Strong knowledge of Embedded Systems, Soft Robots, Mathematical Modelling and Control. Hands-on experience with MATLAB, Python, programming languages and simulation tools. | For JRF: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (for candidates qualified in CSIR-UGC NET or GATE) For Project Associate I: Rs. 30,000/- + 20% HRA (for other selected candidates) | Fill the registration form (as annexed in the notification). Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled application form, latest CV, soft copies of mark sheets/certificates. Email the PDF to [email protected] and [email protected] with subject line “Application for JRF-IRG-SRMC”. Applicants already employed must submit NOC at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The official notification for the engagement of Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I has been released by the Office of Research and Consultancy, NIT Calicut. Download NIT Calicut JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.national_institute_of_technology_calicut: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate I
A Novel Approach to Soft Robot Modelling and Control in Rehabilitation: A Koopman Operator Theory Perspective
Initially 1 year (extendable up to 2 more years)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria & Qualifications
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: First Class in B.Tech / B.E in ECE / EEE or closely allied areas with minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA (for SC/ST/PwD category) from a recognized University. Desirable Qualifications: M.Tech Degree (First Class) in ECE, Embedded Systems, Mechatronics, Robotics, Control and Intelligence or related fields. Strong knowledge of Embedded Systems, Soft Robots, Mathematical Modelling and Control. Hands-on experience with MATLAB, Python, programming languages and simulation tools. For JRF: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (for candidates qualified in CSIR-UGC NET or GATE) For Project Associate I: Rs. 30,000/- + 20% HRA (for other selected candidates) Fill the registration form (as annexed in the notification). Prepare a single PDF containing: Duly filled application form, latest CV, soft copies of mark sheets/certificates. Email the PDF to [email protected] and [email protected] with subject line “Application for JRF-IRG-SRMC”. Applicants already employed must submit NOC at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Calicut Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Only 01 (One) position for JRF / Project Associate I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF at NIT Calicut 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA for candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for NIT Calicut Soft Robot Project JRF?
faq.answer: First Class B.Tech/B.E in ECE/EEE or allied areas. M.Tech in relevant specializations is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q5. When is the interview date for NIT Calicut JRF position?
faq.answer: The offline/online interview is scheduled for 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: Send the consolidated PDF application to [email protected] and [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for NIT Calicut JRF?
faq.answer: GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualified candidates get higher fellowship (JRF). Others will be considered as Project Associate I.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration for NIT Calicut ANRF Research Project?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 more years (total 3 years).

faq.question: Q9. Can final year students apply for NIT Calicut JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed the required degree with minimum qualifying marks.

faq.question: Q10. Is PhD registration possible after selection in NIT Calicut JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, the selected candidate can register for PhD at NIT Calicut as per institute rules.
